arts.sum: Last weekend, we covered claims from Italy which stated Manchester United will table an offer of around €30-35m plus bonuses for Patrick Dorgu. It was also said Manchester United’s interest in the 20-year-old is a concern for Napoli, who are also keen on signing the US Lecce star. arts.ttl: Blocking, decoys and brute force: How Arsenal unleash Gabriel at corners
arts.sum: Since the start of last season, Arsenal have scored more goals from corners than any other team in the Premier League. It was the 20th goal that Arsenal have scored from a corner in the Premier League since the start of last season, five more than any other side in that span.

arts.ttl: Man United wonderkid could be handed first-team debut at Arsenal after Ruben Amorim's side are hit with a double blow
arts.sum: Teenager Godwill Kukonki will reportedly be in Manchester United's matchday squad for Wednesday's Premier League clash against Arsenal.
